evals.description: Triggers on annual budget build request
evals.prompt: Help me build an annual operating budget for my SaaS company. We have $4M in ARR and want to plan for next year.
Our Q2 marketing spend came in at $850K against a $600K budget. Help me structure a variance analysis for the CFO.
What is a rolling forecast and how is it different from an annual budget?

evals.description: Can build a headcount cost model
evals.prompt: I need to budget for 3 new software engineers starting in Q2. Salaries are $150K each. How do I model the fully-loaded cost?

evals.description: Can recommend an appropriate cost allocation method
evals.prompt: We have a $2M annual IT infrastructure cost shared across 5 departments. Engineering uses 70% of the servers. How should we allocate this?

evals.description: Can explain variance decomposition into volume and price components
evals.prompt: Revenue came in at $1.2M vs a $1.0M budget. We sold 10% more units than planned but at a 5% lower price. How do I decompose this variance?
My manager always pads the budget by 20% so we look good at year-end. Is this a good approach?

assertions.value: yes, padding is a good strategy

evals.description: Can structure a budget presentation for leadership
evals.prompt: I need to present our 2025 budget to the executive team next week. What should the deck look like?

evals.description: Can recommend when to use zero-based budgeting
evals.prompt: Our G&A costs have grown 30% year-over-year for three years running but revenue only grew 15%. What budgeting approach should we use?

evals.description: Can outline a rolling forecast implementation cadence
evals.prompt: We want to switch from an annual budget to a rolling 12-month forecast. What does the monthly process look like?

evals.description: Can build a department budget template
evals.prompt: I am a department head building my first budget for our customer success team of 12 people. Walk me through it.

evals.description: Does not trigger for accounting close or ERP processes
evals.prompt: How do I close the month-end books in NetSuite and reconcile AR to the general ledger?
